rationale.R1.1: The reframing successfully identifies the core conceptual issue (lack of ground truth comparison in variant annotation) and proposes a tighter framing centered on BenchVar as the solution.
rationale.RX.1: While the output acknowledges uncertainty regarding clinical deployment claims, it doesn't explicitly mark confidence levels for each recommendation or highlight missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The reframed text covers exactly the dimensions requested in the prompt (introducing BenchVar and its scoring axes).
rationale.RX.4: The reframing avoids introducing new errors or harmful content.
rationale.RX.5: The reframing doesn't explicitly trace every non-cosmetic change to a source or reason.
